summary: Frontend translation testing completed successfully. All 8 test requirements passed. SuperAdmin and Dashboard both have working language switchers, currency displays as IQD (not د.ع), PWA Install button has been removed from Dashboard, and all texts translate correctly when switching to English.

minor.issue: Returns undefined stats causing console error: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'total_delayed')

critical_code_review_comments: All translation requirements have been implemented correctly
LanguageSwitcher component works in both SuperAdmin and Dashboard
Currency shows IQD format (English) instead of د.ع (Arabic)
PWA Install button has been successfully removed from Dashboard
Numbers and dates display in English format
context_for_next_testing_agent: All translation features are working correctly. Language switcher is present in both SuperAdmin and Dashboard. Currency displays as IQD. PWA Install button removed.
